200.description: Password accepted; TOTP challenge required within five minutes

200.description: Closed operational-job catalog with schedule and latest execution

get.summary: Search and paginate all clubs with current-season and solver indicators

200.description: Bounded infrastructure probes; individual failures produce a degraded payload, never a probe exception

200.description: The authenticated user + its club context

get.summary: Hydrate the authenticated user and its active club context

delete.summary: RGPD erasure: anonymize the connected account (re-authentication: current password required); if no active member remains, schedule the club workspace purge (30-day grace, auto-cancelled if a member returns)

patch.summary: Update the connected user profile (name / e-mail)

200.description: RGPD portability export of the connected account (user + memberships), served as a JSON download

get.summary: RGPD portability: export the connected user own account data (self-only)

400.description: Wrong current password or new password too short

post.summary: Change the connected user password (current password required)

202.description: Verification pending — an email was sent (identical for a fresh or an already-registered address)

post.summary: Register a user (creates an unverified account; sends an email-verification link)

club_name.description: Required only when the ARA creates a new club (snake_case)

consent.description: RGPD: acceptance of the terms & privacy policy — required (400 without)

200.description: Verified — materialises the club and returns a JWT (effective login)

post.summary: Consume an email-verification token: verify the account, create/join its club, and log in

token.description: The raw token from the verification email link

200.description: NATIONAL public holidays ∪ the club territory extras within the window (zone null → NATIONAL only)

400.description: No club in context, invalid from/to, or no window (no active season) — a null zone still returns the NATIONAL fériés (no short-circuit)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start (YYYY-MM-DD) — defaults to the active season start

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end (YYYY-MM-DD) — defaults to the active season end

400.description: No club in context, or (when the club zone is set) invalid from/to or no window (no active season) — a null zone short-circuits to 200 with empty items

parameters.name: from

parentConstraintId.description: N→N+1 lineage: source constraint of the season-transition copy.

calendarEntryId.description: Set to attach this constraint to a CalendarEntry (period) — excludes it from base generation.

ConstraintPeriodOverride.description:
Period-editable structure: a sparse per-(period, constraint) toggle — the permanent
constraint is disabled for the period. No row = the constraint applies as usual. The
overlay build reads these; the base plan is never touched.

ConstraintPeriodOverride.ConstraintPerio.description:
Period-editable structure: a sparse per-(period, constraint) toggle — the permanent
constraint is disabled for the period. No row = the constraint applies as usual. The
overlay build reads these; the base plan is never touched.

isActive.description: false = the constraint is disabled for this period.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

FBI match number (import idempotence key) — null for manual entries.
FBI match number (import idempotence key) — null for manual entries.

schedulePlanId.description: NULL = base plan; set = a period overlay.

calendarEntryId.description: Non-null → this is a period overlay (palier B), not a season plan.

schedulePlanId.description: ADR-0002: the SchedulePlan this schedule is a version of (null pre-backfill).

versionNumber.description: ADR-0002: this schedule's version number within its plan (V1, V2…).

generatedTeamCount.description:
Number of teams in the frozen solve input (planning-versions divergence
banner: "generated with N teams — the structure has changed since").

hasStructurePhoto.description:
planning-versions D3: does this version carry a restorable structure photo
(ScheduleStructureSnapshot, D2)? Only then can "Charger cette version"
succeed — a plan generated before D2 has a solver payload (so
generatedTeamCount is set) but no photo, and must not offer the action.

isLiveContext.description:
planning-versions: is THIS the version whose structure is the season's
currently loaded context (★)? Set on every COMPLETED season plan and
re-pointed by "Charger cette version". The ★ tracks the loaded context,
not the version being viewed. Set by ScheduleStateProvider (batched).

isChosen.description:
ADR-0002 inv. 1: does this version's plan POINT at it? That is the whole of
"validated" — the plan holds the version that counts, and there is no status
saying so. True for the season's calendar in force and for a period's overlay
in force alike. Set by ScheduleStateProvider (batched); false on the bare
fromEntity path.

calendarEntryId.description: Set at POST to create this schedule as a period overlay (palier B); ignored on PUT.
Non-null → this is a period overlay (palier B), not a season plan.

schedulePlanId.description: ADR-0002: the SchedulePlan this schedule is a version of (null pre-backfill).

versionNumber.description: ADR-0002: this schedule's version number within its plan (V1, V2…).

generatedTeamCount.description:
Number of teams in the frozen solve input (planning-versions divergence
banner: "generated with N teams — the structure has changed since").

planning-versions D3: does this version carry a restorable structure photo

SchedulePlan.description:
Le Plan — le conteneur nommé des versions d'une saison ou d'une période. Le plan
de saison et sa version choisie sont le calendrier de base de la saison.

Un plan est créé et supprimé par le serveur, et sa version choisie est désignée
en validant cette version. Seul son nom est éditable.

teamSelectionInitialized.description:
La sélection d'équipes de ce plan a-t-elle déjà été configurée au moins une fois ?
Toujours faux sur un plan SEASON, qui n'a pas cette étape.

startDate.description: Required at creation; null on update = keep the current value (partial PUT).

endDate.description: Required at creation; null on update = keep the current value (partial PUT).

isEngaged.description:
Cette équipe joue-t-elle déjà en compétition ? Vrai dès qu'elle porte AU MOINS UN
match, quel qu'en soit le statut : la correspondance faite par l'import FBI entre
une rencontre et cette équipe suffit — la fédération la connaît. Elle ne peut alors
plus être supprimée ni changer de `level`. Son nom, son tier, son `isActive` et ses
créneaux restent libres.

plus être supprimée ni changer de `level`. Son nom, son tier, son `isActive` et ses
créneaux restent libres.

TeamPeriodOverride.description:
Period-editable structure: a sparse per-(period, team) override — the team is
off for the period, or trains a different number of sessions. No row = seasonal
defaults. The overlay build reads these; the base plan is never touched.

Period-editable structure: a sparse per-(period, team) override — the team is
off for the period, or trains a different number of sessions. No row = seasonal
defaults. The overlay build reads these; the base plan is never touched.

sessionsPerWeek.description: null = keep the team's seasonal sessionsPerWeek.
